race.description: Highlander Central Coast 18-19 Apr Provincial Handicap (C1)
race.comment: ERIN JO (3) nice filly resuming. Can progress quickly this time in after scoring a tough Super Maiden win over 1400m at Warwick Farm in January. Fitted with the two 1000m trials and gets her chance from the low gate. AZURE ANGEL (6) is a handy filly who returns for her second campaign. Rounded them up effortlessly on debut over 1200m at Scone last November. Hasn't been pushed out in the two trials and is sure to go close. GREYT THINKER (4) has needed both runs back and the blinkers go on from the soft gate. Proven at this grade and the booking of Zac Lloyd is a good lead.LIGHTNING GLORY (1) lightly raced gelding with a stack of ability resuming. Won on debut over this track and trip last October and his two subsequent runs had merit. Fitted with the two searching 1000m trials and gets his chance.
